items.title: Discord 社区日报 (2026-07-09)
items.summary: 今日 6,702 条消息，360 位活跃用户，1,147 次反应。热门频道：🔸game-question(1947)、🔸綜合討論(1125)、🔸русский-канал(950)、🔸ruang-obrolan-indonesia(625)、🔸team-building(569)
items.author: Discord Archiver

items.title: [DC] morimensstaff02@🔸服务器公告┊server-announcement:   **关于近期社群相关讨论的说明**  我们已关注到近期关于一位本地化工作者在其个人账号中发表的内容，及其相关讨
items.summary:
**关于近期社群相关讨论的说明**

我们已关注到近期关于一位本地化工作者在其个人账号中发表的内容，及其相关讨论。

我们的社群规范对友好交流有明确的要求，也规定了应当远离引发对立、不友善言论的行为边界。这一标准同样适用于我们的团队成员——在此次事件中，相关言行未能符合这一要求。我们已暂停该成员一切对外活动，团队内部将进行严肃的调查与处理。

脑缸组始终希望社区中每一个人都能感受到被尊重，这也是我们社区一直珍视的底线。此次事件中的相关言行让一些守密人感到了不适与冒犯，对此我们深表歉意，并将引以为戒，继续致力于守护好社区应有的交流氛围。
——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——
**Regarding the Recent Community Discussion**

We're aware of the recent discussion surrounding content posted by one of our localization staff on their personal account.

Our community guidelines set clear expectations for friendly interaction, and they define boundaries against conduct that stirs up conflict or is unkind toward others. These standards apply equally to members of our team — and in this instance, that standard was not met. We have paused all of this team member's public-facing activities, and the matter will be seriously reviewed and addressed internally.

We want everyone in our community to feel respected — that has always been a principle we hold dear. The conduct in question left some Secret Keepers feeling uncomfortable and offended, and for that we sincerely apologize. We will take it as a lesson and remain committed to protecting the kind of respectful, welcoming atmosphere our community is meant to have.
  └ zulsoma:
items.author: morimensstaff02

items.title: [DC] morimensstaff06@🔸活动资讯┊event-information: ⏰ **预售时间**   🛒 **购买方式** ✦ 方式1：前往淘宝搜索并进入「灵犀互娱官方旗舰店」 - 点击店铺首页的商品图跳
items.summary:
⏰ **预售时间**


🛒 **购买方式**
✦ 方式1：前往淘宝搜索并进入「灵犀互娱官方旗舰店」 - 点击店铺首页的商品图跳转前往商品界面 - 预售开启之后即可进行购买

✦ 方式2：复制链接到浏览器中打开 - 登录淘宝账号进入商品详情界面 - 预售开启之后即可进行购买
https://c.tb.cn/h.RysuwD5qYaorENR?tk=EbLigoakxWf

🛍️ **周边详情**
✦ 售卖方式
单个镭射票盲盒包含「普通版」镭射票×4、「稀有版」镭射票×1，款式互不重复。盲盒共有116种掉落组合。

✦ 款式设计
一共有58款图案，设计由背面与正面组成（背面为命轮，正面为与命轮有关的唤醒体或角色立绘），其中有4款包括了两个角色差异版本。每款均分为「普通版」与「稀有版」两个版本，共计124种设计。

💡 **更多商品信息、盲盒概率说明请查看长图。**

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

⏰ **Pre-order Time**


🛒 **How to Purchase**
Copy the link and open it in your browser. Log in to your Taobao account to access the product details page. You can purchase the product once the pre-order begins.
https://c.tb.cn/h.RysuwD5qYaorENR?tk=EbLigoakxWf

🛍️ **Merch Details**
✦ Available Formats
Each Ticket blind box contains 4 × "Standard Edition" tickets and 1 × "Rare Edition" ticket, with no duplicate designs. There are 116 possible combinations in total.

✦ Design Details
A total of 58 designs. Each design consists of a front and a back side—the back displays a WoD, while the front features the illustration of the Awakener or character related to that WoD. Among these, 4 designs include two different character variations. Each design comes in two versions: "Standard" and "Rare", totaling 124 variations.

💡 **The current product details page may not be refreshed, so please refer to the long image for accurate product information.**
[附件: CN.png, EN.png, 7b3fa6fcbf7e3bb7.png]
  └ morimensstaff06:
